steps.title: Place the prior research
steps.content: The underlined sentence describes Prud'homme and colleagues' work on convergent evolution through a shared genetic mechanism. The next sentence gives another prior research example, and the final sentence explains that Green and Extavour later studied both types together.

steps.title: Name its function
steps.content: A is wrong because Prud'homme and colleagues are not discussed later in detail. C reverses the influence, and D overstates the sentence as a clarification. The underlined sentence functions as an example of earlier research before the later study. The answer is B.
